name: Jim Lovell

contactInfo.office: 401 E. Goliad Ave., Suite 210, Crockett, TX 75835

bio: Jim Lovell serves as the Houston County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Houston County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Crockett area.
campaignPromises: Keep Houston County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
